parityMeta.describes: SR-2 buildReplacementOptions over lat-pulldown WITH an unavailableEquipment context (cable). Exercises the equipment branch: the equipment_fallback rank (machine-row), the equipmentReasonNotes appended to each reason, hasHardUnavailableEquipment partitioning (cable-tagged single-arm-lat-pulldown / seated-row sink last), equipmentAdjustedRankScore, and the captured-index final tie-break of the equipment re-sort.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: buildReplacementOptions is clockless → generatedAtPolicy 'none'. unavailableEquipment uses ExerciseEquipmentTag string literals.
